name: io.arkova/verification
title: Arkova Verification
description: Privacy-first document verification anchored to the public ledger. Verify credentials, search 29,000+ anchored records, query SEC filings and patents via RAG, and anchor document fingerprints — all without documents ever leaving the user's device.

environmentVariables.name: ARKOVA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Arkova API key. Get one at https://app.arkova.io/settings/api-keys

tools.name: verify_credential
tools.description: Verify a credential's authenticity and current status by its public identifier.

tools.name: search_credentials
tools.description: Search for credentials using natural language queries with semantic similarity matching.

tools.name: nessie_query
tools.description: Query Arkova's verified intelligence engine over SEC filings, patents, and regulatory documents.

tools.name: anchor_document
tools.description: Submit a document SHA-256 fingerprint for anchoring to the public ledger.

tools.name: verify_document
tools.description: Verify a document by its SHA-256 fingerprint and get anchor proof.

resources.name: api-overview
resources.description: Overview of Arkova's verification API, available tools, and authentication.

resources.name: credential-types
resources.description: Supported credential types, record types, and status values.

prompts.name: verify-credential
prompts.description: Look up and verify a credential by its Arkova public ID.

prompts.name: search-and-verify
prompts.description: Search for credentials and verify the top result.

prompts.name: anchor-and-verify
prompts.description: Anchor a document fingerprint and confirm submission.

prompts.name: research-topic
prompts.description: Research a topic using Nessie's verified intelligence engine.
